concerns.text: T053a (anonymization/encryption) and T053b (secure deletion) are in Phase 6 (Polish) but Constitution VII requires data to be anonymized/encrypted at rest DURING data collection (Phase 3). This violates the constitutional requirement that participant data must be protected before any data collection begins.

T057 (GitHub Actions compatibility verification) is in Phase 6 but should be in Phase 2 (Foundational). Infrastructure feasibility must be verified before user story implementation begins, not after all stories are complete.
T055a, T056a are marked [US3] but are Constitution compliance tasks (Principles III, V). These are infrastructure requirements that should be in Phase 2 (Foundational), not tied to US3 specifically.

T005 [P] (consent flow) and T006 [P] (logging infrastructure) are marked parallel-safe but may depend on T004 (environment configuration) for API keys and log paths. [P] tasks must have no hidden shared state or implicit ordering requirements.

T050, T051, T052 (contract/integration/unit tests) are in Phase 6 but should be part of each US checkpoint. Per spec-kit precedent, each user story must be independently testable end-to-end; test execution should follow each story's implementation, not be deferred to Polish phase.
T048 (quickstart.md) is in Phase 6 but plan.md specifies quickstart.md as Phase 1 output. Documentation task is in wrong phase.

T046, T047 (dropout handling, fast-completion detection) are NOT marked [P] but may be parallel-safe as edge case handlers. Consider marking [P] if they have no dependencies on T039-T043 statistical tests.
T058 (constraints.md) is NOT marked [P] but is a documentation task. Consider marking [P] if it has no dependencies on other tasks.
